extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won from position after Alpecin-Fenix controlled final kilometer, defeating Groenewegen/Bennett who were too far back at flamme rouge
tactical_patterns: Alpecin-Fenix successfully positioned Philipsen at flamme rouge while UAE/BikeExchange pace-setting failed to organize their own sprinters
Bennett (Bora-Hansgrohe) deliberately stayed rear peloton until late, finishing strongly but from too far back to contest
Groenewegen took barriers in sprint suggesting positioning panic when losing Philipsen's wheel in final 200m

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: won despite UAE/BikeExchange controlling pace, revealing Alpecin's positioning superiority over stronger lead-out teams
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: finished fast from dead-last positioning suggests knee concerns resolved but team lead-out disorganized
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: UAE paced for home sprinter but Ackermann finished mid-pack, exposing team's inability to deliver their own rider
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: took barriers while losing Philipsen's wheel indicates positioning errors despite team pace-setting
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: faded after being well-positioned suggests form concerns this early in season
